content.fact_text: A comprehensive package.json file providing all necessary dependencies for a production-ready, high-availability, microservice-based ecommerce backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines the production-grade dependency manifest for the ecommerce backend, ensuring all required infrastructure clients (pg, ioredis, kafkajs, etc.) are available for the runtime.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the infrastructure foundation for the system, enabling development and deployment of the ecommerce backend using battle-tested libraries.

content.source_code:
{
  "name": "complex-ecommerce-backend",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "High-availability, production-ready ecommerce backend microservice",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc",
    "start": "node dist/index.js",
    "test": "jest",
    "lint": "eslint 'src/**/*.ts'",
    "migrate": "knex migrate:latest"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "argon2": "0.41.1",
    "dotenv": "16.4.5",
    "ioredis": "5.4.1",
    "joi": "17.13.3",
    "jsonwebtoken": "9.0.2",
    "kafkajs": "2.2.4",
    "knex": "3.1.0",
    "opossum": "8.3.1",
    "pg": "8.12.0",
    "pino": "9.3.2",
    "pino-pretty": "11.2.2",
    "rate-limiter-flexible": "5.0.3",
    "winston": "3.14.2",
    "zod": "3.23.8"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/jest": "29.5.12",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "9.0.6",
    "@types/node": "20.14.10",
    "@types/supertest": "6.0.2",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "7.14.1",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "7.14.1",
    "cross-env": "7.0.3",
    "eslint": "8.57.0",
    "jest": "29.7.0",
    "supertest": "7.0.0",
    "ts-jest": "29.1.5",
    "typescript": "5.5.3"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },
  "author": "ACN Actuator",
  "license": "UNLICENSED"
}
